# Warranty Implications

At Acme Shop, warranties are provided for manufacturing defects and certain failures, but improper care or misuse can void this coverage. Customers must follow provided care instructions to maintain warranty eligibility; for example, using a washing machine for hand-wash-only items can lead to voided claims. Warranty claims require proof of proper maintenance and must be submitted within one to two years, depending on the product category. Edge cases like accidental damage are not covered but may be eligible for repair at a discount. For more information, customers are encouraged to contact customer service regarding care and warranty issues.

[Source: product_care.md#warranty-implications]
